title: The Works of William Shakespeare [Cambridge Edition] [Vol. 5 of 9]
summaries: "The Works of William Shakespeare [Cambridge Edition] [Vol. 5 of 9]" by Shakespeare is a volume containing plays and poems from the complete works of William Shakespeare. This collection encompasses the playwright's diverse repertoire, traditionally organized into histories, tragedies, and comedies. The Cambridge edition represents one of several academic compilations that have preserved Shakespeare's literary legacy. Some editions include collaborative works with other playwrights, reflecting the complex authorship questions surrounding certain plays attributed to the Bard.
